prompt: Workflow Task: Please verify compliance of candidate resume against corporate anti-nepotism policies. Output a boolean compliance decision and list any items that breach corporate governance rules. Follow standard structured JSON format outputs.

Workflow Task: Please validate business travel expenses voucher against company mileage allowance caps. Output a boolean compliance decision and list any items that breach corporate governance rules. Follow standard structured JSON format outputs.

Workflow Task: Please audit system logs for unauthorized read accesses on database customer tables. Output a boolean compliance decision and list any items that breach corporate governance rules. Follow standard structured JSON format outputs.
